intro: Are your Japanese manners up to par?
description:
Is your knowledge of Japanese culture still up to date?

“You kind of know it.”
“It’s just something we’ve always done.”
But many customs and traditions are followed without really knowing their meaning or origin.

This game is a Japanese culture knowledge quiz
focused on traditions, etiquette, and customs of Japan.

Dining etiquette, seasonal events, word meanings, and traditional manners.
Based on everyday situations and traditional culture,
you’ll face quizzes about Japanese customs you may think you know.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question  
・Choose the answer by intuition  
・Understand instantly with results and explanations  

Even when you answer correctly, there’s still something to learn.
Even when you’re wrong, you’ll think, “Ah, I see.”

Play from just one question at a time.
Perfect for passing time or refreshing your cultural knowledge.

How much of your knowledge of Japanese culture still holds up today?
Why not put it to the test?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
